allow: Bash(mkdir -p data/raw/brats data/raw/icbm data/processed scripts src configs models outputs)
Bash(touch data/raw/brats/.gitkeep data/raw/icbm/.gitkeep data/processed/.gitkeep src/.gitkeep configs/.gitkeep models/.gitkeep outputs/.gitkeep)
Bash(git -c user.name="setup" -c user.email="setup@local" commit -q -m "Scaffold synthetic brain MRI project")
